backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor that composes blob storage, access control, Stripe payments, and HTTP outcalls, exposing endpoints for user profile management, role assignment, Stripe session handling, and file storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming implementation of the EN/FR language toggle button in the header, listing the affected files (Header.tsx, Layout.tsx, LanguageContext.tsx) and associated components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend structure and content.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines all TanStack Router routes (Home, WhitePaper, Tokenomics, Projects, RoadMap, Bridge, Resource, SignUp) under a root Layout route and exports the RouterProvider.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Dark-themed footer with TMU AI DAO branding, a two-column Quick Links grid, social media icons, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header featuring the TMU AI DAO logo, desktop and mobile nav menus, a gold-accented EN/FR language toggle button powered by LanguageContext, and Sign Up/Connect Wallet action buttons.
frontend/src/components/HeroIllustration: Renders an SVG-based network hub illustration with a central copper hexagon connected to 6 colored nodes arranged in a circle, displayed over a dark blue gradient background.
frontend/src/components/IoMPopup.tsx: A modal dialog component that displays structured content (title, main text, and multiple sections) with customizable colors, using Radix UI Dialog and ScrollArea.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps the app with LanguageProvider and renders a Header, Footer, and a TanStack Router Outlet for page content.
frontend/src/components/TMUIRESPopup.tsx: A fixed overlay popup displaying a title, description, and three external resource links (documentation, video, additional links) styled with a dark navy background and gold/green gradient buttons.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for toggling between English ('EN') and French ('FR') languages, exposing the current language and a toggle function via the useLanguage hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, providing a React context and hook with login/logout functionality, identity state, and login status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching the caller's user profile, resource page content, and TMU IRES popup content from the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that configures Tailwind, defines a dark navy color system via CSS custom properties, and adds utility classes for gold and green gradient text.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page for TMU AI DAO featuring a hero section with illustration, feature cards, and a popup explaining the Isle of Man Hybrid Company legal wrapper structure for the DAO.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectsPage.tsx: Displays a grid of static TMU AI DAO portfolio projects (TeleMeetUp, Morshid, Etitude, Vospital, etc.) with descriptions, category badges, and multiple action buttons including a TMU-IRES popup.
frontend/src/pages/ResourcePage.tsx: Resources and documentation page that fetches and renders TMU technical architecture layers, getting-started guides, and downloadable documents using data from a custom query hook.
frontend/src/pages/RoadMapPage.tsx: Renders a static six-phase roadmap (2024–2030) for TMU AI DAO with progress indicators, quarterly breakdowns, status icons, and user growth targets per phase.
frontend/src/pages/SignUpPage.tsx: Sign-up and sign-in page that also serves as a token purchase interface, allowing users to select or enter a custom USD amount to buy $TMU tokens with fee calculation and payment method tabs.
frontend/src/pages/TokenomicsPage.tsx: Displays the $TMU token economics page including fixed supply stats, staking reward tiers (Bronze/Silver/Gold), and token utility information for the TMU AI DAO platform.
frontend/src/pages/Web2Web3BridgePage.ts: Renders a page showcasing 10 Web2-to-Web3 use cases (legal, health, NGO, etc.) as clickable cards that open detail dialogs explaining blockchain benefits, concerns, and token usage for each sector.
frontend/src/pages/WhitePaperPage.tsx: Presents the TMU AI DAO whitepaper with a scrollable sidebar navigation, sections covering problems, solutions, technology architecture, governance, tokenomics, and roadmap, plus links to a video and PDF download.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom color tokens using oklch variables, border radius, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 3, recording an existing feature and a pending fix request to add a visible EN/FR language toggle button to the top navigation bar.
